category: BCR-ABL and Src family kinase inhibitor
mechanism: Targets and inhibits BCR-ABL and Src family kinases
Inhibits Bruton's tyrosine kinase to impair B-cell proliferation
Activates AMP-activated protein kinase to affect glucose metabolism
Triggers apoptosis and promotes differentiation in leukemic cells
Blocks autophagy pathways, affecting tumor cell survival
Disrupts redox homeostasis by inhibiting thioredoxin reductase
Inhibits RNA polymerase, preventing mRNA synthesis
Blocks proteasome activity, leading to apoptosis of cancer cells
Lowers cholesterol production; may affect cancer cell metabolism
additional_notes: Primarily used for lowering cholesterol levels

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylase, affecting cell cycle and differentiation
Inhibits angiogenesis and modulates immune responses
